17:31:56.423: [i] 
17:31:56.423: [i] 
17:31:56.423: [i]         Executes Group 01 test cases for internal server variable data operations.
17:31:56.423: [i] 
17:31:56.423: [i]         This group includes:
17:31:56.423: [i]         - TC01: Verifies reading of variable data from the internal server.
17:31:56.423: [i]         - TC02: Verifies writing of variable data to the internal server.
17:31:56.423: [i]         - TC03: Verifies simultaneous read/write operations on variable data for the internal server.
17:31:56.423: [i] 
17:31:56.423: [i]         Returns:
17:31:56.423: [i]             None
